assets.note: Allowed: PNG, JPEG, WebP, GIF · max. 10 MB. Files are validated and stored under a safe name.

settings.languageNote: Your language is saved and applies after signing in again on other devices.

twofa.title: Two-factor authentication (2FA)
twofa.intro: Protects your account with a time-based one-time code (TOTP) from an authenticator app such as Google Authenticator, Aegis or 1Password.
twofa.scanHint: Scan the QR code or link in your authenticator app – or enter the key manually. Then confirm with a current code.
twofa.disableHint: Enter a current code from your app to disable 2FA.
twofa.enabledMsg: 2FA is now active. You'll need a code on every sign-in from now on.

users.reset2faConfirm: Really reset 2FA for "{{user}}"? The user will then sign in with a password only and must set up 2FA again if needed.

backup.note: Backups contain the database & configuration as gz-JSON. Secrets stay encrypted – keep the ENCRYPTION_KEY safe and separate.
backup.restoreConfirm: Restore backup "{{name}}"? All current data will be overwritten.
backup.restoreDone: Restore complete. Please sign in again if users changed.

loghint.generic: A possible problem was detected – see the log.
loghint.source_missing: The source/file was not found. Check the path or mount.
loghint.network_unreachable: Network target unreachable. Check address, port and connection.
loghint.auth_failed: Authentication failed. Check stream key or credentials.
loghint.rtmp_rejected: The RTMP server rejected the connection. The stream key is likely wrong.
loghint.bad_media: The media could not be read (codec/container).

auth.token_expired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
auth.forbidden: You don't have permission to do that.
auth.totp_required: This account has 2FA enabled. Please enter your code.
auth.totp_invalid: The 2FA code is invalid or expired.

setup.ffmpeg_not_found: FFmpeg was not found at the given path.

preflight.no_video: The input contains no video stream.
preflight.missing_stream_key: The destination is missing its stream key.

storage.test_failed: The connection to the source failed.

upload.unsupported_type: File type not supported (allowed: PNG, JPEG, WebP, GIF).
